# DispatchPredicate.onQueueAsBarrier(_:)

**Case**

A predicate that indicates the evaluated context is the associated dispatch queue as part of a barrier operation.

## Declaration

```swift
case onQueueAsBarrier(DispatchQueue)
```

## Discussion

For more information about barrier operations, see `[doc://com.apple.dispatch/documentation/Dispatch/DispatchWorkItemFlags/barrier]`.

## Predicates

- **DispatchPredicate.onQueue(_:)**: A predicate that indicates the evaluated context is the associated dispatch queue.
- **DispatchPredicate.notOnQueue(_:)**: A predicate that indicates the evaluated context is not the associated dispatch queue.
